---
title: "The Algorithm of Coxtrans"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{coxtrans-algorithm}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>"
)
```

## Problem Formulation

$$
\ell(\boldsymbol{\beta},\boldsymbol{\eta}_{1},\ldots,\boldsymbol{\eta}_{s})=\sum_{i=1}^{s}\sum_{j=1}^{n_{i}}\delta_{ij}\left\{\mathbf{x}_{ij}\left(\boldsymbol{\beta}+\boldsymbol{\eta}_{i}\right)-\log\left(\sum_{k\in\mathcal{R}_{ij}}\exp\left(\eta_{k}(t_{j})\beta_{k}\right)\right)\right\}
$$

```{r setup}
library(survtrans)
```
